Example_EN: The key was nowhere to be found this morning.
Example_CN: 今天早上钥匙无处可寻。

Example_EN: The country plans to build a new nuclear power station.
Example_CN: 该国计划建一座新核电站。

Example_EN: She has visited London numerous times already.
Example_CN: 她已多次访问伦敦。

Example_EN: Their son starts nursery school next September.
Example_CN: 他们儿子明年九月上幼儿园。

Example_EN: She keeps a bag of mixed nuts in her desk.
Example_CN: 她书桌里放着一袋什锦坚果。

Example_EN: Good nutrition supports children as they grow.
Example_CN: 良好营养支持儿童成长。

Collocation: obey rules;obey the law;refuse to obey
Example_EN: Drivers must obey the speed limit near schools.
Example_CN: 司机必须遵守学校附近的限速。

Example_EN: A pen is a useful everyday object in class.
Example_CN: 笔是课堂上有用的日常物品。

Example_EN: Does anyone have an objection to this plan?
Example_CN: 有人对这个计划有异议吗？

Example_EN: Our main objective is to finish by Friday.
Example_CN: 我们的主要目标是周五前完成。

Collocation: legal obligation;sense of obligation;under an obligation
Example_EN: Parents have a legal obligation to educate children.
Example_CN: 父母对子女教育有法律义务。

Example_EN: Scientists kept the volcano under close observation.
Example_CN: 科学家密切观察这座火山。

Example_EN: Please observe the safety rules in every lab class.
Example_CN: 每次实验课请遵守安全规则。

Example_EN: You must obtain permission before using the equipment.
Example_CN: 使用设备前必须获得许可。

Collocation: obvious reason;it is obvious;far from obvious
Example_EN: The answer became obvious after her explanation.
Example_CN: 她解释后答案变得显而易见。

Example_EN: He was obviously tired after the night shift.
Example_CN: 夜班后他显然很累。

Example_EN: A wedding is a special occasion for the whole family.
Example_CN: 婚礼是全家的特别场合。

Example_EN: We get occasional rain even in summer here.
Example_CN: 这里夏天偶而下雨。

Example_EN: She visits her grandparents occasionally on Sundays.
Example_CN: 她偶尔在周日看望祖父母。

Example_EN: Teaching is her main occupation and greatest joy.
Example_CN: 教学是她的主要职业也是最大乐趣。

Collocation: occupy a seat;occupy time;occupy the mind
Example_EN: Please do not occupy more than one seat.
Example_CN: 请不要占用超过一个座位。

Example_EN: Accidents can occur when drivers feel sleepy.
Example_CN: 司机困倦时可能发生事故。
MemoryTip: occur：发生；occur to 表示想到。

Example_EN: Plastic waste threatens every ocean on earth.
Example_CN: 塑料垃圾威胁地球每一片海洋。

Example_EN: Three is an odd number, but four is even.
Example_CN: 三是奇数，四是偶数。

Collocation: against the odds;odds of;improve the odds
Example_EN: They won the match against the odds.
Example_CN: 他们逆境中赢得了比赛。

Example_EN: Be careful not to offend older guests with jokes.
Example_CN: 开玩笑时小心别得罪年长客人。

Example_EN: The court treated the young offender with care.
Example_CN: 法院对年轻违法者处置审慎。

Example_EN: Please avoid offensive language in class discussions.
Example_CN: 课堂讨论请避免冒犯性语言。

Example_EN: A police officer helped us find the right bus.
Example_CN: 一位警察帮我们找到了正确的公交车。

Example_EN: Please bring an official document to confirm your identity.
Example_CN: 请带官方文件确认身份。

Example_EN: Support for the victims is an ongoing project.
Example_CN: 对受害者的支持是一项持续项目。

Example_EN: Please put the keys onto the kitchen table.
Example_CN: 请把钥匙放在厨房桌子上。

Example_EN: Check the shop opening hours before you leave home.
Example_CN: 出门前查看商店营业时间。

Example_EN: Only trained staff may operate this machine.
Example_CN: 只有受训人员可以操作这台机器。

Example_EN: The new factory is now in full operation.
Example_CN: 新工厂现已全面运转。

Example_EN: A machine operator checked every product carefully.
Example_CN: 一位机器操作员仔细检查每件产品。

Example_EN: Respect your opponent even when you win easily.
Example_CN: 即使轻松获胜也要尊重对手。

Example_EN: Travel abroad is a golden opportunity to learn English.
Example_CN: 出国旅行是学习英语的绝佳机会。

Example_EN: Many residents oppose the plan for a new motorway.
Example_CN: 许多居民反对新建高速公路的计划。

Example_EN: The proposal faces strong opposition from local shops.
Example_CN: 该提案面临本地商店的强烈反对。

Example_EN: More students opt for online courses than before.
Example_CN: 选择线上课程的学生比以前多。

Example_EN: Taking the train is the best option for this trip.
Example_CN: 这次旅行坐火车是最好选择。

Example_EN: She has an oral exam in French next week.
Example_CN: 她下周有法语口试。

Example_EN: The satellite has been in orbit for ten years.
Example_CN: 这颗卫星已在轨道运行十年。

Collocation: symphony orchestra;play in an orchestra;school orchestra
Example_EN: She plays violin in the school orchestra.
Example_CN: 她在学校管弦乐队拉小提琴。

Example_EN: The heart is a vital organ for human life.
Example_CN: 心脏是人类生命的重要器官。

Example_EN: They prefer organic food from local farms.
Example_CN: 他们更喜欢本地农场的有机食品。

Example_EN: She works for a charity organisation abroad.
Example_CN: 她在国外一家慈善组织工作。

Example_EN: Students will organise a charity fair next month.
Example_CN: 学生下月将组织一场慈善义卖。

Example_EN: Please thank the chief organiser after the show.
Example_CN: 演出后请感谢主承办人。

Example_EN: Check the country of origin on the food label.
Example_CN: 查看食品标签上的原产国。

Example_EN: Is this the original version or a later copy?
Example_CN: 这是原版还是后来的副本？

Example_EN: The café was originally a small bookshop.
Example_CN: 这家咖啡馆原来是一家小书店。

Example_EN: Leave now, otherwise you will miss the train.
Example_CN: 现在出发，否则你会误火车。

Example_EN: You ought to apologise if you were rude.
Example_CN: 如果你无礼就应该道歉。
MemoryTip: ought to：应当（语气比 should 更正式）。

Collocation: an ounce of;sixteen ounces;ounce of truth
Example_EN: Add one ounce of butter to the warm pan.
Example_CN: 往热锅里加一盎司黄油。

Example_EN: No one can predict the final outcome of the vote.
Example_CN: 没人能预测投票的最终结果。

Example_EN: Hiking is a popular outdoor activity here.
Example_CN: 徒步是这里受欢迎的户外活动。

Example_EN: Children love to play outdoors after school.
Example_CN: 孩子们放学后喜欢在户外玩。

Example_EN: Peel the outer layer of the onion carefully.
Example_CN: 仔细剥去洋葱的外层。

Example_EN: Please write a brief outline before the full essay.
Example_CN: 写完整作文前请先拟简短提纲。

Example_EN: Factory output rose by ten percent last year.
Example_CN: 去年工厂产量增长百分之十。

Example_EN: She received a prize for outstanding achievement.
Example_CN: 她因杰出成就获奖。

Collocation: hot oven;put in the oven;microwave oven
Example_EN: Bake the cake in a hot oven for thirty minutes.
Example_CN: 在热烤箱中烤蛋糕三十分钟。

Example_EN: The overall impression of the show was excellent.
Example_CN: 演出的总体印象非常出色。

Example_EN: She worked hard to overcome her fear of speaking.
Example_CN: 她努力克服害怕发言的恐惧。

Example_EN: He hopes to study overseas after graduation.
Example_CN: 他希望毕业后出国留学。

Example_EN: I still owe you twenty pounds from last week.
Example_CN: 我上周还欠你二十英镑。

Example_EN: The shop owner greeted every customer with a smile.
Example_CN: 店主微笑迎接每位顾客。

Example_EN: They celebrated the transfer of house ownership.
Example_CN: 他们庆祝了房屋所有权的转让。

Example_EN: Climbing high mountains can mean a lack of oxygen.
Example_CN: 登高山可能意味着缺氧。

Collocation: at a pace;keep pace;change the pace
Example_EN: Walk at a comfortable pace if you feel tired.
Example_CN: 如果累了就按舒适节奏走。

Collocation: pack a bag;pack of cards;pack tightly
Example_EN: Please pack a bag for the weekend trip.
Example_CN: 请为周末旅行打包行李。

Example_EN: The post office delivered a package this morning.
Example_CN: 邮局今早送来一个包裹。

Collocation: packet of crisps;seed packet;open a packet
Example_EN: She bought a packet of crisps for the picnic.
Example_CN: 她为野餐买了一袋薯片。

Example_EN: She felt a sharp pain in her right shoulder.
Example_CN: 她右肩感到一阵剧痛。

Example_EN: The cut on his finger was extremely painful.
Example_CN: 他手指上的伤口极其疼痛。

Example_EN: The famous painter lived in Paris for twenty years.
Example_CN: 这位著名画家在巴黎住了二十年。

Example_EN: Tourists waited hours to visit the royal palace.
Example_CN: 游客排队数小时参观皇宫。

Example_EN: She looked pale after the long night of study.
Example_CN: 彻夜学习后她面色苍白。

Example_EN: Solar panels cover the school roof this year.
Example_CN: 今年学校屋顶铺满太阳能电池板。

Example_EN: Do not panic if you forget one exam question.
Example_CN: 忘了一道考题也不要慌张。

Collocation: a pair of pants;wear pants;pants pocket
Example_EN: He bought a new pair of pants for the interview.
Example_CN: 他为面试买了一条新裤子。
MemoryTip: pants：裤子（英美用法略有不同）。

Example_EN: Children waved flags during the street parade.
Example_CN: 街头游行中孩子们挥舞旗帜。

Example_EN: Please write one more paragraph about your holiday.
Example_CN: 请再写一段关于假期的文字。

Example_EN: The river runs parallel to the main road.
Example_CN: 河流与主路平行延伸。

Example_EN: Is there free parking near the station?
Example_CN: 车站附近有免费停车吗？

Example_EN: The new law was debated in parliament last week.
Example_CN: 上周议会辩论了这项新法律。

Example_EN: Every participant received a certificate at the end.
Example_CN: 每位参与者结束时都获得证书。

Example_EN: All students should participate in the group discussion.
Example_CN: 所有学生都应参加小组讨论。

Example_EN: Teachers encourage active participation in every lesson.
Example_CN: 老师鼓励每节课积极参与。

Example_EN: I like fruit, and apples in particular.
Example_CN: 我喜欢水果，尤其是苹果。

Example_EN: The film is particularly good for young teenagers.
Example_CN: 这部电影尤其适合少年观看。

Example_EN: We arrived late partly because of the traffic.
Example_CN: 我们迟到部分因为交通拥堵。

Example_EN: The two schools formed a partnership last year.
Example_CN: 两所学校去年建立了合作关系。

Example_EN: Read the passage carefully before you answer.
Example_CN: 答题前仔细阅读这段文字。

Example_EN: She has a passion for classical music.
Example_CN: 她对古典音乐充满热情。

Example_EN: Never share your password with anyone online.
Example_CN: 永远不要在网上与任何人分享密码。

Example_EN: Learning a language needs patience and daily practice.
Example_CN: 学语言需要耐心和每日练习。

Example_EN: Please be patient while we check your booking.
Example_CN: 我们核对预订时请有耐心。
